title: Le Républicain Lorrain
summary:
Le Républicain Lorrain (French pronunciation: [lə ʁepyblikɛ̃ lɔʁɛ̃] ; founded in 1919) is a daily regional French newspaper based in Metz. As of 2012, its daily circulation was 123,357. In 2020, its circulation amounted to 87,508 copies.
The newspaper has its primary market in the région of Lorraine.
It belongs to the French bank Crédit Mutuel, which also owns the newspapers L'Alsace and Le Pays.

It belongs to the French bank Crédit Mutuel, which also owns the newspapers L'Alsace and Le Pays.
